monitoring_logging.question: What is monitoring, and why is it important in DevOps?
What is logging, and how does it differ from monitoring?
Name some commonly used monitoring tools.
What is a metric in system monitoring?
What is an alert, and when should it be triggered?
Why are logs important when troubleshooting production issues?
What are dashboards used for in monitoring systems?
What is uptime monitoring?
What is latency?
Why should applications generate structured logs?
Explain the difference between metrics, logs, and traces.
How would you design an effective monitoring dashboard for a production application?
How would you reduce alert fatigue while ensuring important incidents are detected?
Explain the purpose of centralized logging.
What metrics would you monitor for a web application running in production?
How would you investigate an application's performance using logs?
How would you determine whether high CPU usage is affecting application performance?
Explain the purpose of log retention policies.
How would you monitor containerized applications running in Kubernetes?
How would you monitor the health of a CI/CD pipeline?
Design a monitoring strategy for a globally distributed microservices application.
How would you implement observability for a large cloud-native application?
Explain the trade-offs between collecting detailed logs and minimizing storage costs.
How would you design a highly available centralized logging system?
Explain how distributed tracing helps diagnose performance issues in microservices.
How would you monitor an application serving millions of requests per minute?
Describe the key Service Level Indicators (SLIs) and Service Level Objectives (SLOs) you would define for a production API.
How would you detect memory leaks using monitoring tools?
Explain how you would correlate metrics, logs, and traces during a production incident.
How would you build a monitoring system that minimizes false-positive alerts while ensuring rapid incident detection?
At 2:15 AM, your monitoring dashboard reports a sudden spike in response time for a critical API. Walk me through how you would investigate the issue.
Users report intermittent failures, but all infrastructure metrics appear normal. How would you identify the root cause?
Your monitoring system sends hundreds of alerts every hour, causing engineers to ignore notifications. How would you improve the monitoring strategy?
A production service crashes unexpectedly, but the application logs contain very little useful information. How would you approach the investigation?
A recently deployed application experiences gradually increasing memory usage over several days. Explain how you would determine whether a memory leak exists.
A customer reports slow response times only in one geographic region. Describe how monitoring data would help isolate the issue.
A Kubernetes cluster reports that one service has become unhealthy, but all Pods are still running. Walk me through your troubleshooting process.
Disk usage on a logging server reaches 100%, preventing new logs from being stored. How would you restore logging while minimizing the loss of diagnostic information?
An executive asks why the engineering team should invest in observability instead of relying only on server monitoring. How would you explain the benefits?
You're designing monitoring for a new cloud-native application expected to serve millions of users. Explain which metrics, logs, traces, and alerts you would implement before launch.
